name: Glassmorphism
author: akellainmotion
description: Frosted glass effects, backdrop blur, transparent layers, soft edges

componentOverrides.button: bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/20 rounded-2xl hover:bg-white/20 transition-all
componentOverrides.card: bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/20 rounded-2xl shadow-lg
componentOverrides.input: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-lg border border-white/10 rounded-xl focus:border-white/30 focus:bg-white/10
componentOverrides.badge: bg-white/15 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20 rounded-full text-xs px-3 py-1
componentOverrides.alert: bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/20 rounded-2xl p-4
